mapper.select: SELECT CASE WHEN gender = 1 THEN '男性员工' WHEN gender = 2 THEN '女性员工' ELSE '未知' END as name, COUNT(*) as value FROM emp WHERE gender IN (1, 2) GROUP BY gender ORDER BY gender

SELECT CASE job WHEN 1 THEN '教研主管' WHEN 2 THEN '学工主管' WHEN 3 THEN '其他' WHEN 4 THEN '班主任' WHEN 5 THEN '咨询师' WHEN 6 THEN '讲师' ELSE CONCAT('未知职位(', job, ')') END as jobName, COUNT(*) as employeeCount FROM emp WHERE job IS NOT NULL AND job BETWEEN 1 AND 6 GROUP BY job ORDER BY job ASC
